steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject is the plural noun "Objects." The phrase listing the soy sauce bottle, motorcycle, and train modifies that subject but does not change its number.

steps.title: Use the plural verb
steps.content: Choice A, choice B, and choice C use singular verb forms. A plural subject needs a plural verb, and "were" correctly agrees with "Objects" in this past-tense sentence. The answer is D.
